  Continued roadmap work across this session:
  
  1. **Aora venue layout PDF** — Saved Jerri's 1-page consolidated event flow & venue layout to .github/attachments and linked from the roadmap page
  2. **Track map dependency corrections** — Separated GACC/Brazil Compliance from China/Aora Events into distinct tracks. Fixed Legal Entity Structuring and GACC from "blocking" to "parallel" to Brazil Export Entity
  3. **Anchor-linked track cards** — Added HTML anchor IDs so clicking a dependency name scrolls to that track's detail card
  4. **Missing downstream tracks restored** — Chives Root (10 bags consignment), Michael Johnson consignment, Kopi Bar Jul 10 tasting, Graeme Read partnership all added as separate track cards
  5. **ROADMAP_UPDATE_SOP.md** — Created standard operating procedure for any agent to update the roadmap
  6. **append_to_transcript bug fix** — Filed PR #257 on truesight_autopilot
  
  PRs merged:
  - agentic_ai_context#567 (dependency corrections)
  - agentic_ai_context#568 (anchor links + missing tracks)
  - truesight_me_beta direct push (venue layout link — should have been a PR)

  - .github/attachments/2026-06-19_aora_event_flow_and_venue_layout.pdf
  - .github/attachments/2026-06-19_matheus_cnae_timeline.jpg
